input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.3.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.3.2.3
            TITLE: failure of non-loadbearing components in the brake system or pedal box must not interfere

            CONTENT:
            rule T.3.2.3: Failure of non-loadbearing components in the Brake System or pedal box must not interfere
T.3.2.3 Failure of non-loadbearing components in the Brake System or pedal box must not interfere 
with Brake Pedal operation or Brake System function

final_answer: Failure of non-loadbearing components in the Brake System or pedal box must not interfere with Brake Pedal operation or Brake System function
